name: CLOUDASTRUCTURE, INC.
summary: PART I . Overview Cloudastructure, Inc. (Cloudastructure, we, our, or the Company) is an award-winning innovator in cloud-native, AI-powered security solutions, delivering comprehensive, real-time situational awareness to enterprises to protect people, property, and brand reputation from threats such as theft, vandalism, false liability and violence.
